hotel_name: Makkah Clock Royal Tower, A Fairmont Hotel
raw_description:
Makkah Clock Royal Tower, A Fairmont Hotel – Redefining Luxury in the Heart of Makkah
Welcome to Makkah Clock Royal Tower, A Fairmont Hotel, the ultimate destination for luxury, convenience, and spiritual devotion in Makkah. Located adjacent to Al Masjid Al Haram, this architectural marvel is the closest five-star hotel to the Kaaba, offering an unparalleled experience for pilgrims performing Umrah and Hajj. Standing tall at 601 meters with 76 floors, the hotel boasts 1,662 elegant rooms and suites, offering breathtaking views of Al Kaaba, Al Haram, and the mesmerizing Makkah skyline. Whether you seek family-friendly accommodations, the exclusivity of Fairmont Gold, or the sophistication of the Royal Floors, your stay promises to be unforgettable.

Prime Location with Exceptional Access
Situated just steps from the Holy Mosque’s South Gate, the hotel provides direct access to Al Haram and features a private entrance, ensuring seamless convenience for pilgrims. The Haramain High-Speed Railway Station is just a short drive away, connecting guests effortlessly to Jeddah and beyond. For those arriving by car, 24-hour valet parking adds an extra layer of ease.
Exclusive Services Tailored for Your Comfort
Makkah Clock Royal Tower, A Fairmont Hotel, offers 24-hour butler service, ensuring every detail of your stay is meticulously attended to. Guests staying on the Fairmont Gold Floor are treated to royal services, including:

A dedicated lounge open 14 hours, featuring gourmet refreshments and serene seating areas.
Private prayer rooms, providing a tranquil space for spiritual devotion.
VIP elevators for swift and seamless access to exclusive floors.
The Royal Floors take luxury to new heights, offering unparalleled privacy, bespoke services and interiors designed for a truly regal experience.
Culinary Delights to Satisfy Every Palate
Discover an exceptional array of dining options that cater to every taste:

Al Dira: The first five-star Saudi restaurant in Makkah, offering a lavish buffet with panoramic views of the Kaaba and Holy Mosque. Featuring authentic Bedouin dishes, Levantine specialties, and live ouzi stations, Al Dira blends tradition with luxury.
Atyaf: A casual, contemporary all-day dining venue showcasing a kitchen theater, juice station, and pizza and pasta stations. Perfect for families and gatherings.
Mazaq Express: Ideal for guests on the go, this quick-service café offers fresh and wholesome pre-packaged meals, flavored coffees, and juices in a stylish setting near the reception area.
Al Dar: A boutique-style Lebanese buffet featuring a shawarma station and table service of cold mezzeh on fine china. A blend of traditional flavors and modern elegance, accommodating 313 guests.
The Grill: Makkah’s first fine-dining steakhouse, offering the finest cuts of meat in a warm, elegant setting.
Aja: A vibrant Asian noodle restaurant serving fresh noodles, dim sum, fried rice, and Indonesian favorites like Nasi Goreng and Mee Goreng.
Mazedar: An authentic Indian buffet featuring a live tandoor station, bold spices, and contemporary ambiance, accommodating 227 guests.
Lezzet: Indulge in Ottoman-inspired cuisine, from Silk Road lamb dumplings to sweet olive desserts and hearty beef stews fit for royalty.
Mirkaz: A modern street-side café offering signature coffees, chocolates, and sweets in a relaxed and stylish environment.
Mazaq: A luxurious patisserie and lounge with an extensive portfolio of coffees and teas curated by expert sommeliers.
The View Café: An outdoor café overlooking Al Haram, offering a serene setting to enjoy snacks, gourmet coffee, and stunning views of the sacred site.
In-Room Dining: Enjoy 24-hour dining in the comfort and privacy of your room, featuring an extensive menu inspired by the hotel’s diverse culinary portfolio.

Wellness and Relaxation
The hotel offers exclusive wellness experiences, including;

Dedicated health clubs for men and women, equipped with state-of-the-art fitness facilities.
A luxurious beauty salon, perfect for rejuvenation and pampering.
A vibrant kids' club, ensuring a fun and engaging experience for younger guests.
Unmatched Event and Business Facilities
With grand ballrooms, flexible meeting spaces, and cutting-edge business centers, Makkah Clock Royal Tower is the ideal venue for prestigious gatherings, conferences, and celebrations.
The Legacy of Time and Innovation
As home to the Makkah Royal Clock, the hotel features one of the world’s largest clock faces, symbolizing modernity and grandeur. Guests can explore the Clock Tower Museum, a cultural and scientific exhibition that celebrates the intersection of tradition and innovation.
Your Gateway to Spiritual and Luxury Experiences
Makkah Clock Royal Tower, A Fairmont Hotel, combines world-class amenities, spiritual proximity, and luxurious accommodations to offer a transformative stay in the Holy City. From royal services to breathtaking views, every moment here is designed to inspire devotion and provide unmatched comfort.

Couples particularly like the location — they rated it9.4for a two-person trip.

description: Experience clinical levels of high-end luxury at Makkah Clock Royal Tower, A Fairmont Hotel. Located conveniently in its prime location, this property features 11 key amenities including Family rooms, Free WiFi, 8 restaurants.
